detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Raijin._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Raijin.sol#709-833):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (Raijin.sol#773)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (Raijin.sol#847-859)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (Raijin.sol#779)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (Raijin.sol#867)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (Raijin.sol#831)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (Raijin.sol#993)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (Raijin.sol#973)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (Raijin.sol#975)
	Raijin._rOwned (Raijin.sol#385) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Raijin._takeTeam(uint256) (Raijin.sol#987-995)
	- Raijin._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (Raijin.sol#947-983)
	- Raijin.balanceOf(address) (Raijin.sol#535-539)
	- Raijin.constructor() (Raijin.sol#469-499)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (Raijin.sol#831)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (Raijin.sol#1001)
	Raijin._rTotal (Raijin.sol#397) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Raijin._getCurrentSupply() (Raijin.sol#1143-1153)
	- Raijin._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (Raijin.sol#999-1005)
	- Raijin.constructor() (Raijin.sol#469-499)
	- Raijin.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (Raijin.sol#631-653)

		- [_rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount)](Raijin.sol#L973)
		- [_rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount)](Raijin.sol#L975)

	- [Raijin._takeTeam(uint256)](Raijin.sol#L987-L995)
	- [Raijin._transferStandard(address,address,uint256)](Raijin.sol#L947-L983)
	- [Raijin.balanceOf(address)](Raijin.sol#L535-L539)
	- [Raijin.constructor()](Raijin.sol#L469-L499)
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](Raijin.sol#L831)
		- [_rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee)](Raijin.sol#L1001)
	[Raijin._rTotal](Raijin.sol#L397) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [Raijin._getCurrentSupply()](Raijin.sol#L1143-L1153)

		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (Raijin.sol#847-859)
	External calls sending eth:
	- _transfer(sender,recipient,amount) (Raijin.sol#607)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (Raijin.sol#867)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _approve(sender,_msgSender(),_allowances[sender][_msgSender()].sub(amount,ERC20: transfer amount exceeds allowance)) (Raijin.sol#609-623)
		- _allowances[owner][spender] = amount (Raijin.sol#701)
